# **EXECUTIVE SUMMARY:** 

# *SWING MATCH %*

## ***The Single Metric That Will Transform PG1 Into an Unshakeable Retention Engine***

**Prepared by:** CMO Advisory Panel

**For:** CEO, CMO, Chief Technology Officer | Performance Golf

![][image1]

![][image2]

# **THE ONE-LINE PITCH**

**Swing Match % answers the question every golfer secretly asks:** 

***"Am I becoming the golfer I want to be?"***

This isn't another metric. It's the visible, identity-based progress signal that defeats The Scattered Playbook—and the reason users will never want to leave.

# **WHAT SWING MATCH % IS**

A single percentage that shows golfers how close their swing matches the golfer they aspire to be.

* User selects their target identity (favorite PRO, influencer, or model swing, Tiger, Rory, Scottie, Grant, etc.)  
* User uploads a swing  
* **Receives one clear number: "Your Swing Match: 58%"**

Swing Match % is evaluated across **five universal swing phases**:

1. Setup  
2. Backswing  
3. Downswing  
4. Impact  
5. Finish

These phases are:

* familiar to golfers  
* visually recognizable  
* consistent across skill levels

This creates a stable framework for comparison.

The system does **not** evaluate “good” or “bad.”  
It evaluates **distance from the users target “Swing Match”**.

The core loop then becomes an engine for users to increase their “Swing Match %” in whichever area of focus they choose. 

No angles. No charts. No confusion. Just direction.

*"I'm already doing a lot like Tiger." That's the first emotional hook.*

# **WHY THIS CHANGES EVERYTHING**

## **The Problem We Solve**

Progress in golf today is:

* **Internal** (felt, not seen)  
* **Abstract** (confidence, control, stability)  
* **Fragmented** (many metrics, no anchor)  
* **Private** (nothing shareable)

When progress is only *felt*, it's easy to dismiss. A single bad session erases weeks of belief. That's why users churn.

## **The Breakthrough**

**Swing Match % makes progress visible, recognizable, and identity-defining.**

When golfers can *see* themselves changing—when they watch their before/after and see the transformation—belief locks in. Stopping the app feels like giving something up.

*That's retention that doesn't require convincing.*

# **HOW IT DRIVES THE METRICS THAT MATTER**

| Driver | How Swing Match % Delivers |
| ----- | ----- |
| **Engagement** | One clear focus replaces analysis paralysis. Users know exactly what to work on next—no guesswork. |
| **Transformation** | Visual before/after proof creates belief that survives bad days. Progress becomes stable, not fragile. |
| **Identity Shift** | Users aren't chasing a number. They're becoming someone. That's emotionally sticky. |
| **LTV** | When progress is visible and protected, quitting means losing something. Users stay to *protect* their transformation. |

# **THE VIRAL LOOP BUILT IN**

Swing Match % doesn't stay in the app. It *leaves*. It gets SHARED\! 

* **Auto-generated before/after videos** require no explanation  
* **One-tap sharing** removes all friction (send your swing match video to IG, TT, FB, X immediately)  
* **Face-cam and voice-over layers** turn proof into story

A golfer sees their Swing Match improve by 15%. They see the visual of how much closer their swing is to Tiger than when they started. 

They send the overlay video to a friend: 

*"Dude... look at this. I’m going to be swinging like Tiger in 2000 before you know it\! This app is nuts\!"*

* NOTE: Imagine Lebron wants to swing like Tiger. He gets his Swing Match % dialed in and then shares his OVERLAY video of him “matching” 70% of Tiger’s 2000 swing on all his socials…  

No marketing budget required. **The product creates moments worth sharing.**

# **THE MONETIZATION LADDER**

| Tier | What It Does | Why They Upgrade |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Free (Lead Gen)** | 1 Swing Match calculation/month. First hook. Viral engine. (ADS INSIDE PLATFORM) | *"Let me see if this works"* |
| **Core ($9.99/mo)** | Unlimited uploads to see Swing Match %. 1 Core Area Of Focus (Learn, Train, Challenge unlocked). 1 VIP Coaching Swing Review in Coach Chat. (ADS INSIDE APP) | *"This is how I steadily improve"* |
| **Elite ($29.99/mo)** | Unlimited Swing Match Assessments. Unlimited Core Loop Access. Unlimited VIP Coaching & Swing Reviews. Accelerator Discounts. Priority personalization. Unlock all features in APP: GPS, SC, Core Loop connected to your coach. Unlimited Swing Reviews. (NO ADS INSIDE PLATFORM)  | *"Less friction. More magic."* |

Users don't feel upsold. They feel **invited deeper**.

# **WHY THIS IS THE FUTURE OF PG1**

**From the Panel:**

*"Every great consumer product has ONE metric users obsess over. Peloton has the leaderboard. Duolingo has the streak. Nike Run Club has pace. PG1 needs its signature—and Swing Match % is it."*

— CMO Advisory Panel

Swing Match % gives PG1 something rare: **a repeatable viral format grounded in real improvement.**

It's not another feature. It's the anchor that organizes everything—the single story users remember, share, and protect.

# **THE IDENTITY SHIFT WE CREATE**

**FROM:** "I'm a frustrated golfer stuck in THE NOISE, THE CONFUSION, The Scattered Playbook."  
**TO:** "I'm someone who loves their game and gets better every time I play."

When progress becomes visible, golfers don't just play better. **They start to love their game in a whole new way.**

# **RECOMMENDATION: MOVE NOW**

Swing Match % is not an incremental improvement. It's the organizing principle that turns PG1 from a good product into **infrastructure golfers build their improvement around**.

*Less guesswork. More magic.*  
*Make progress permanent.*

**This is how we help everyday golfers love their game again.**

*"It will happen."*

## **What We Are Building**

We are not building more products, features, or content.

**We are building a system that helps golfers see themselves becoming better.**

* When identity is reinforced, engagement sticks.  
* When engagement sticks, LTV compounds.

## **The Single Metric: Swing Match %**

One number that answers the question every golfer secretly asks:

*"Am I becoming the golfer I want to be?"*

This isn't another swing stat. It's an **identity signal**.

It represents how close a golfer's swing matches the player they aspire to become—visible, shareable, and impossible to forget.

## **Why This Changes Everything**

Swing Match % transforms progress from something golfers *feel* into something they can *see*.

When progress is visible:

* Belief locks in  
* Bad sessions don't erase momentum  
* Stopping feels like losing something

**When identity sticks, LTV follows.**

# **THE PROBLEM**

*Why The Scattered Playbook Keeps Golfers Stuck*

## **The Universal Truth**

Everyone agrees on one thing: **Retention comes from progress.**

Golfers stay when they feel they're getting better. They leave when they don't.

The problem isn't *whether* progress matters. The problem is **how progress is experienced and remembered**.

## **The Enemy: The Scattered Playbook**

Right now, most golfers are trapped in what we call **The Scattered Playbook**. It looks like this:

* Random YouTube tips that contradict each other  
* Magazine drills with no context  
* Buddy's advice from his lesson last week  
* Training aids collecting dust in the garage  
* Standing over the ball with 12 swing thoughts

**What The Scattered Playbook creates:**

* Paralysis and confusion  
* No clear path forward  
* Information collected but never connected  
* More effort \= more frustration

## **Problem 1: Progress is Invisible**

Most golf products measure progress in ways that are:

* **Internal** (felt, not seen)  
* **Abstract** (confidence, control, stability)  
* **Fragmented** (many metrics, no anchor)  
* **Private** (nothing shareable)

When progress is only *felt*, it's fragile. A single bad session can erase weeks of belief. A chunked wedge can undo a month of momentum.

That frustrated walk back to the cart? That's not a bad shot. That's The Scattered Playbook winning.

## **Problem 2: Golfers Can't Recognize Their Own Improvement**

Even when improvement is real, golfers keep asking:

* "Am I actually getting better?"  
* "Is this really working?"  
* "Would anyone else even notice?"

If the answer is unclear, motivation drops. Progress that can't be **recognized** is hard to protect. Progress that isn't protected doesn't drive long-term retention.

## **Problem 3: Too Many Metrics \= No Shared Focus**

Today, progress is spread across swing mechanics, practice behavior, mental state, app engagement, and multiple dashboards.

This creates confusion:

* Users don't know what "success" looks like  
* Product teams don't know what to optimize toward  
* LTV becomes impossible to model predictably

**When everything matters, nothing anchors.**

## **Problem 4: Progress Doesn't Leave the App**

Even when improvement *does* happen, it usually stays private. Most progress:

* Can't be shown clearly  
* Can't be explained quickly  
* Isn't visually obvious to others

This forces growth to rely on paid acquisition rather than the product itself creating moments worth sharing.

## **The Core Realization**

Progress that drives retention must be:

* **Recognizable** — golfers can see it clearly  
* **Stable over time** — one bad day doesn't erase it  
* **Easy to understand** — no explanation needed  
* **Visually obvious** — before/after is instant  
* **Shareable** — worth showing to others

Internal progress motivates. **Visible progress retains and spreads.**

# **THE INSIGHT**

*Why Visible, Identity-Based Progress Changes Everything*

## **The Missing Piece Isn't More Data**

Progress fails to retain when it is:

* Only felt internally  
* Easy to forget  
* Hard to explain  
* Impossible to show

The missing piece is not *more analysis* or *better metrics*. The missing piece is **visibility**.

## **Progress Must Be Seen to Be Believed**

Humans trust what they can see. In golf, a player can feel more control, feel more confidence, feel more stability. But if they cannot **see** a difference, doubt creeps in.

This creates a familiar cycle: Progress feels real one week → Disappears emotionally after a bad session → Motivation resets → Retention weakens.

## **Identity Changes Everything**

There's one category of progress humans protect far more strongly than performance: **Identity progress.**

People don't ask: "Am I more consistent than last week?"

They ask: **"Am I becoming the kind of golfer I want to be?"**

Identity is:

* Aspirational  
* Directional  
* Emotionally sticky

When progress is framed as *becoming someone*, it's remembered longer and abandoned less easily.

## **The Ultimate Identity Transformation**

**FROM:** "I'm a frustrated golfer stuck in The Scattered Playbook"

**TO:** "I'm someone who loves their game and gets better every time I play"

## **Why Visual Identity Progress Is Uniquely Powerful**

Visual progress:

* Requires no explanation  
* Is instantly recognizable  
* Can be compared over time  
* Can be shown to others

# **THE SINGLE METRIC**

*How Swing Match % Works (Without Exposing Complexity)*

## **An Identity Signal, Not a Swing Stat**

Swing Match % is not raw data. It's the **final expression** of progress—experienced as a single, clear number.

Under the hood, it's built from objective, angle-based comparisons. On the surface, it's experienced as: *"Here's how close you are to becoming the golfer you want to be."*

**Users never see mechanics. They see progress.**

## **Rules for Swing Match % (Non-Negotiable)**

This metric must:

* **Update weekly** — consistent rhythm creates habit  
* **Improve with effort, not perfection** — progress compounds  
* **Be impossible to fake** — fed by real behavior  
* **Be emotionally meaningful** — connected to identity  
* **Feel like something worth protecting** — stopping \= loss

If a user stops using the app, this is what they feel they're abandoning.

## **What Feeds Swing Match %**

Everything rolls up into one number:

* **Practice behavior** — showing up matters  
* **Swing Scan validation** — real measurement  
* **App engagement** — consistent usage  
* **Magical Shot frequency** — capturing the wins  
* **Product usage** — training aids and gear that accelerate

**One metric. One focus. One story.**

## **The Five Swing Phases**

Swing Match % is evaluated across five universal swing phases:

1. Setup  
2. Backswing  
3. Downswing  
4. Impact  
5. Finish

These phases are familiar to golfers, visually recognizable, and consistent across skill levels.

## **What the User Experiences**

The user does **not** see angles, degrees, equations, phase breakdowns, or multi-metric dashboards.

They see:

* Their Swing Match % after upload  
* One recommended focus area  
* Clear visual before/after comparisons

  *"Here's where you are. Here's what moves you forward fastest. Here's proof that it's working."*

# **THE CORE LOOP**

*The Execution Standard*

## **The Five-Step Loop**

**Everything we build strengthens this:**

### **1\. ASSESS**

Passive capture or simple check-in. The app observes. The user just plays. No burden. No friction. No overthinking.

### **2\. RECOMMEND**

One focus. One action. Not ten fixes. Not a dashboard of opportunities. Just: *"This is what moves you forward fastest."*

### **3\. ACT**

Practice with clarity. The golfer goes to the range or course with one intention, one goal, one clear reason. Practice feels lighter when you know exactly what to work on.

### **4\. REFLECT**

Identity first. Data second. *"You're becoming more consistent. Your Swing Match improved. This is working."* The golfer leaves confident, not analytical.

### **5\. ANCHOR**

Metric updates. Magical shots saved. Progress becomes visible. Identity becomes reinforced. Leaving becomes costly.

## **Repeat Weekly**

This loop creates:

* **Habit** (weekly rhythm)  
* **Belief** (visible progress)  
* **Identity** (emotional attachment)  
* **LTV** (compounding value)

**If a feature doesn't serve the loop, it doesn't ship.**

# **MAGICAL SHOT CAPTURE**

*The Identity Engine*

Magical Shot Capture is not a feature. **It is proof of identity.**

Every magical shot a user captures is an emotional receipt that says:

* "This works."  
* "I'm improving."  
* "I can do this again."  
* "This is who I'm becoming."

## **What Magical Shots Represent**

A magical shot is that flush iron that splits the fairway, the putt that drops from twenty feet, the drive that makes your playing partners stop and stare.

These aren't just good shots—they're **those moments that define why we love this game**.

## **How It Strengthens the System**

* **Creates emotional receipts of progress** — proof that lives forever  
* **Makes improvement tangible** — not just felt, but saved  
* **Gives users moments worth saving** — and sharing  
* **Turns practice into memory** — every session has potential  
* **Feeds the single metric** — magical shot frequency influences Swing Match %

The more magical shots saved, the higher the switching cost. **That's LTV protection built into the product.**

# **THE REFLECT STEP**

*The Emotional Hinge of the Loop*

This is where most platforms fail. Reflection that shows data without meaning creates awareness. **Reflection that shows identity creates attachment.**

The Reflect step is the emotional hinge of the entire loop. It's the moment where belief either locks in—or leaks out.

## **Reflect Step Structure**

### **1\) Identity Statement (Always First)**

One sentence. Calm. Affirming. Directional. Examples:

* "You're becoming more consistent week to week."  
* "Your great shots are happening more often."  
* "Your misses are tighter than last week."  
* "You're showing more control under pressure."

This sentence should feel like **a coach speaking**, not software reporting.

### **2\) Supporting Signal (Optional, Minimal)**

Only show data that supports the identity statement:

* "Your Swing Match improved by 2% for your focus area."  
* "Your consistency stayed within range for most of the session."

**No dashboards. No multi-metric panels.** One identity statement. One supporting signal. That's it.

### **3\) Emotional Anchor**

Tie the reflection back to effort:

* "This is the result of showing up."  
* "Consistency like this compounds."  
* "Keep doing what you're doing."  
* "Make progress permanent."

## **The One Filter for Every Reflect Output**

Before showing any insight, ask:

*"Does this make the golfer more confident or more analytical?"*

* If confident → show it.  
* If analytical → hide it.

**That's the difference between retention and churn.**

# **THE SHARE MECHANISM**

*How the Product Creates Moments Worth Sharing*

## **The Principle**

Users don't share because they're told to. They share when the product hands them something that already feels:

* Impressive  
* Personal  
* Expressive  
* Socially validated

The role of the app is to **manufacture the artifact** and **remove all friction**.

## **The Core Artifact: Auto-Generated Before/After Video**

Whenever a meaningful Swing Match % change occurs, the app automatically generates:

* A short-form before/after video  
* Same camera angle  
* Same swing phase  
* Synchronized motion  
* Subtle visual emphasis on what changed

It answers, in under two seconds: *"What changed?"* That clarity is the foundation of virality.

## **One-Tap Distribution (Non-Negotiable)**

From the moment the artifact is generated, the user has one-tap options:

* Post to Instagram  
* Post to TikTok  
* Post to X  
* Export to device  
* Send to editing software

**If sharing requires effort, it doesn't happen.**

## **The Flywheel**

User improves Swing Match % → App auto-generates shareable artifact → User adds reaction (optional) → One-tap post → Engagement team amplifies → Visibility increases → More users join → More magical shots/swing match videos captured → More content created

**Sharing becomes self-reinforcing.**

# **MONETIZATION PLAN**

*Progress-Based Pricing Aligned With Identity Commitment*

## **Core Principle**

Users should never pay to **believe** the system works. They should pay to **become their target golfer faster**.

| Tier | What's Included | Purpose |
| ----- | ----- | ----- |
| **Free** | 1× Swing Match % per month, one focus area, before/after visual, one-tap sharing | Identity discovery & viral engine |
| **Core ($9.99/mo)** | Unlimited uploads, full history, auto recommendations, quarterly coach review | Continuous progression loop |
| **Elite ($29.99/mo)** | Priority personalization, enhanced visuals, premium discounts, exclusive events, ad-free | Accelerated transformation |

## **The Monetization Ladder**

Users naturally progress:

**Free → Core (momentum) → Elite (acceleration) → Private Coaching (mastery)**

Each step is:

* Opt-in  
* Earned  
* Identity-aligned

**Users don't feel upsold. They feel invited deeper.**

# **VIRAL CAMPAIGNS**

*Launching and Scaling Through Identity-Based Distribution*

## **Phase 1: Influencer Seeding**

Every post follows the same structure:

6. Before/after swing video (auto-generated)  
7. Swing Match % reveal  
8. Optional reaction (face-cam or voice-over)

The content is short, visually obvious, instantly understandable. **The format teaches itself.**

## **Phase 2: Core Identity Campaigns**

### **Campaign A: "What % Match Are You?"**

Users upload a swing, choose a target (pro or influencer), receive a Swing Match %. Percentages invite comparison. Identity creates emotional pull.

### **Campaign B: "Which Pro Is Your Swing Most Like?"**

No target selection required. App reveals closest match. Discovery is inherently shareable. Surprise drives posting.

### **Campaign C: The Swing Glow-Up**

Before/after visuals with clear Swing Match % increase. No claims, only proof. Visual change speaks for itself.

## **Phase 3: Company-Owned Amplification**

The company actively maintains hashtags: \#SwingMatch, \#SwingMatchChallenge, \#LookLikeYourPro, \#SwingGlowUp

**Consistency matters more than novelty.**

# **V2 & V3: FUTURE INFRASTRUCTURE**

## **V2: Trend-Adaptive Artifact System**

The product becomes a **trend interpreter, format factory, and relevance engine**.

V2 operates on a fixed rhythm:

* 2–3 new video formats per month  
* Each format clearly labeled with defined use case  
* Each maps to one or more avatars

Swing Match % remains the truth. Formats remain flexible. This is how the system stays modern and survives platform shifts.

## **V3: The Anonymized Intelligence Layer**

V1 builds belief. V2 builds relevance and distribution. **V3 builds enduring strategic value.**

This system captures something unique:

* **Aspiration** (who users want to be)  
* **Behavior** (what they actually do)  
* **Progression** (how change unfolds over time)  
* **Identity reinforcement** (what keeps them engaged)

The moat is systemic, not technical. This positions the company as **a system that understands how people actually change—safely, visually, and at scale**.

# **FINAL TEAM ALIGNMENT**

*What We Are Actually Building*

## **We Are NOT Building:**

* A content library  
* A swing analysis platform  
* A product catalog  
* More dashboards  
* More metrics

## **We ARE Building:**

**A system that helps golfers see themselves becoming better.**

**When identity sticks, LTV follows.**

## **The Ultimate Identity Transformation**

**FROM:** "I'm a frustrated golfer stuck in The Scattered Playbook"

**TO:** "I'm someone who loves their game and gets better every time I play"

## **The Promise We Keep**

**Your path to playing better golf.**

When progress feels possible and personal, you don't just play better. **You start to love your game in a whole new way.**

*Less guesswork. More magic.*

*Make progress permanent.*

***It will happen.***
